matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Technology Policy is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The MPhil in Technology Policy is an intensive, nine-month professional practice master's programme designed for people with a background in science or engineering who are interested in developing the skills needed to meet the challenges of integrating technology, management, economics, and policy.
